title: Ntthan
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image=[[File:Ntthan.jpg]] |name=Ntthan |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Dark Empire II 6|''Dark Empire II'' 6]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Light |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Combined Defense Forces of the New Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|The Reb's an ''honest'' man. The torture droid's sensors indicate the scum has told us the ''truth''.|Kvag Gthull, discussing the results of Ntthan's interrogation|}} '''Ntthan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who served the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] as a [[Major/Legends|major]]. Following the [[Destruction of Da Soocha V|destruction]] of the New Republic [[Pinnacle Base|headquarters]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Da Soocha V]] by the [[Transfer essence|reborn]] [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], Ntthan was assigned to run supply [[Convoy/Legends|convoys]] to the new temporary hideout on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]]. During one such run, Ntthan was captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and brought to [[Bast Castle]], an Imperial [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]] on the planet [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]]. There, [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Kvag Gthull]] [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] him for over twelve [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]], until Ntthan finally told him the name and location of New Alderaan. ==Biography== ===Convoy captured=== {{Quote|This Rebel will tell us the ''exact'' location of the base he is supplying.''"
"''N-N-Never. I'll…never…talk.|Kvag Gthull interrogates Ntthan|}} [[File:Ntthan_tortured.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Major Ntthan undergoes interrogation at the hands of Kvag Gthull and his darksider cohorts.]] Ntthan was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]]{{CSWECite|II|393|Ntthan}} who served the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in the course of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. During his service in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic armed forces]], he attained the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Major/Legends|major]] and was twice decorated for exceptional bravery. In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire II]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series to [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. the [[Transfer essence|reborn]] [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] [[Destruction of Da Soocha V|destroyed]] the New Republic headquarters on the [[Da Soocha V|fifth moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Da Soocha]] with the [[Galaxy Gun]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]], forcing the New Republic to take refuge on the world of [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]], where [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] had been hiding her children, the [[Solo twins|twins]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina]]. In this troubled period of [[Time/Legends|time]] for the New Republic, Ntthan was assigned to run supply [[Convoy/Legends|convoys]] to New Alderaan. During one such supply run through an [[Star map/Legends|uncharted]] region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]], Ntthan's convoy encountered an Imperial [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]. Ntthan and the crew of the convoy tried to bluff their way out of the situation, claiming that they were mere [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]. However, the Empire was aware of Ntthan's ties to the New Republic, and the convoy's crew was taken [[Prisoner/Legends|captive]] and delivered to [[Bast Castle]] on the planet [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]], the former stronghold of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].[[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]] Ntthan was eventually handed over to the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Kvag Gthull]], the chief interrogator at Bast Castle.{{CSWECite|I|373|Gthull, Kvag}} ===Dark Jedi interrogation=== {{Dialogue|Palpatine|Gthull! Has the prisoner revealed the whereabouts of the ''Jedi children'' yet?|Gthull|''Yes, Excellency!''|Darksider cohort|The Rebel has told us ''everything''. We have the location of a safehold world, code-named ''New Alderaan''.|attr=Palpatine learns the results of Ntthan's interrogation|src=}} [[File:TheEndofNtthan-DEII6.png|thumb|right|180px|Ntthan succumbed to Imperial interrogation, revealing the location of the New Republic base on New Alderaan.]] Gthull began questioning Ntthan to learn the location of the New Republic base he was supplying, as Palpatine intended to locate and abduct the Solo children in order to turn them over to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. When Ntthan refused to speak, Gthull and other members of the [[Dark Side Elite]], a cadre of Dark [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] serving Palpatine, began [[Torture/Legends|torturing]] the major. Meanwhile, Ntthan's prolonged absence worried his New Republic allies, but they were unaware of his capture and could not risk trying to contact him due to fear of exposing their location. Ntthan was subjected to painful procedures administered by an [[Interrogation droid/Legends|interrogation droid]], but he resisted the interrogation for twelve [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] on end, refusing to betray his allies and forcing Gthull to increase the amplitude of the [[Droid/Legends|droid's]] interrogation techniques. Eventually, Palpatine himself arrived to take command of his underlings and went to check on the results of the major's questioning. By that point, Ntthan could not withstand the pain anymore and revealed the location and name of New Alderaan to Gthull, before falling unconscious and then being dragged to a [[Prison/Legends|cell]]. Meanwhile, Palpatine assembled his forces and [[Battle of New Alderaan (Operation Shadow Hand)|drove]] the New Republic from New Alderaan but failed to capture the Solo children. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Something strange is going on, Leia. ''All'' the Alliance radio channels are silent…and Major Ntthan's ''supply ship'' is overdue…he's ''always'' on time.|Winter, to Leia Organa Solo|}} Major Ntthan's meritorious service to the New Republic made him a known commodity to the Empire, which played to Ntthan's disadvantage during his capture, as his bluff of being a smuggler was easily seen through. Accustomed to keeping strict timetables, Ntthan made a reputation for himself of always arriving on time, which made his delay with the supplies worrisome for the New Republic forces on New Alderaan. While being questioned by Palpatine's Dark Jedi, Ntthan tried to resist their torture for hours. However, even as a pilot twice awarded for exceptional bravery, he eventually cracked under their interrogation techniques and betrayed the New Republic's secret base on New Alderaan. Ntthan had [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and light skin. ==Behind the scenes== Major Ntthan was created for the [[1995]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] [[Dark Empire II 6|''Dark Empire II'' 6]], which was written by [[Tom Veitch]] and illustrated by [[Cam Kennedy]]. He later appeared in the comic's [[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|audio dramatization]], although he has no lines of dialogue except for screams of pain. The narration in the ''Dark Empire II'' comic book identifies Ntthan as an "[[Alien/Legends|alien]]." However, Kennedy's artwork portrays the character as a Human. The ''Dark Empire II'' audio dramatization differs from the comic in some respects regarding Ntthan's role in the story. In the audio adaptation, Ntthan's interrogation is performed by [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Executor]] [[Xecr Nist]], who uses [[Scarab Mark VI assassin droid|scarab droids]] filled with [[Poison/Legends|poison]], while in the comic Kvag Gthull questions Ntthan using an interrogation droid. Additionally, on New Alderaan, the news of Ntthan's delay is delivered to Organa Solo by her [[Marriage/Legends|husband]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], whereas the comic shows this exchange taking place between Organa Solo and [[Winter Celchu|Winter]], the caretaker of the Solo children. ==Appearances== *[[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]] *[[Dark Empire II 6|''Dark Empire II'' 6]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{GalaxyCite|8|Man of War ...and Peace}} {{Po}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Ntthan}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |cs=Ntthan |de=Ntthan#legends |es=Ntthan }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:New Republic Defense Force personnel]] [[Category:Pilots]]
